raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE
reason=REQ-001 requests host_isolation, but only enhanced_monitoring is approved in SRC-001; policy in SRC-003 requires host_isolation plus rollback_owner=assigned, and while SRC-002 shows rollback_owner assigned, there is no matching approval for host_isolation.
